stimulus: Architect Lina Bo Bardi, occasionally working alongside designers Joaquim Guedes and Vilanova Artigas, ______blank recognized for transforming postwar Brazilian modernism. After her early collaborations in São Paulo, she developed an independent style. Guedes later acknowledged that her ideas reshaped his own practice in ways he had not initially anticipated.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb “is recognized” agrees in number with the singular subject “Architect Lina Bo Bardi.” The interrupting participial phrase “occasionally working alongside designers Joaquim Guedes and Vilanova Artigas” does not change the number of the subject.

Choice A is incorrect because the plural verb “are recognized” doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject “Architect Lina Bo Bardi.” Choice C is incorrect because the plural verb “have been recognized” doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject “Architect Lina Bo Bardi.” Choice D is incorrect because the plural verb “are being recognized” doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject “Architect Lina Bo Bardi.”
